title: February 18th, 2022
body:
i never call myself a skyfucker but when i let it fly
clouds come and cry cuz i'm a fi lover
and i aim high enough to touch it
i never said i wasn't you'se a dumb mother
i'm busy dancin
you need answers
that's your own quest and
love this ain't the time to be half steppin
i'm gonna let it fly yeah that's my weapon
ground gettin wet watch ya step
this when we start trippin
see the sea part and i dip in
hands high
thank god for my vision
i love livin
my favorite part is the pittin
what's in my heart against the moment
cuz in the moment it's all different
[every](every) shot a drop in the bucket
and what i saw isn't enough to make it all fit in
but fuck it
every make a small pittance
every miss a reminder that i'm a small person on a big mission
my life's a short order in a tall kitchen
but don't worry, i still cook in it
get served in a hurry, i'm good wit it
let the spice fly and say good riddance
win or lose the only time i stand by is while i kiss the sky
excuse me if it isn't time to move on a different line
i found my own way in
live or die i put a good day in
best rapper alive, fuck the weigh in
i'm after the crown like a guillotine
after you i run through your whole crew snatching jewelry
after me you're an afterthought
an actor in a silent film
no one's even watching much less hearing you crying foul
i make options a [problem](problem)
i make something outta nothing like oxygen
i'm not a solution i'm a solvent
you can't box me and not pay for it
you may weather the storm but there's more to scorin than points
i surf the breaks and watch the waves pour in
overpowerin joints
the invasion feels foreign when you're used to showering praise
on the same old boring mic jordans
borrowing moves cuz they don't know the importance of being a movement
can't even see it watching me do it
still trying to figure how my bricks are this fluid
but my castle is bigger than the picture they drew in
thinking paper can explain the plane i flew in
my passion is thicker than x and o's
for the love of the game i ain't just flexing on holes
i'm stretching the flow
